items.title: Can confirm the Jazz are bringing back Jusuf Nurkić. The 2-year, $22 million deal is below what many believed Nurk would garner on the FA market, but the situation is helped by how much Nurk truly enjoyed last season, playing for Will Hardy and how valued he felt by the Jazz
items.author: Sarah Todd
items.body_excerpt: Can confirm the Jazz are bringing back Jusuf Nurkić. The 2-year, $22 million deal is below what many believed Nurk would garner on the FA market, but the situation is helped by how much Nurk truly enjoyed last season, playing for Will Hardy and how valued he felt by the Jazz

items.title: Utah Jazz cap situation after re-signing Jusuf Nurkic and declining Bez Mbeng & Hayden Gray.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Utah Jazz cap situation after re-signing Jusuf Nurkic and declining Bez Mbeng & Hayden Gray.

They project with $38.5 million under the luxury tax to re-sign Walker Kessler and use the $15 million mid-level exception.

They could create more room by trading/waiving some players.
